title: Build BackRoad social platform - depth over engagement
description: Social platform with chronological feeds, no algorithmic manipulation, creators own their graphs, no ads, revenue from RoadCoin tips/subscriptions. Core features: chronological timeline, creator ownership, gentle engagement metrics, privacy-first design.
result: ✅ BACKROAD SOCIAL PLATFORM LAUNCHED! Revolutionary social network focused on DEPTH over engagement. Features: No vanity metrics (no likes/followers), deep threaded conversations, personal knowledge bases, zero-knowledge privacy, chronological feeds, no ads/tracking. Beautiful BlackRoad design (Hot Pink gradients, Golden Ratio spacing). Complete manifesto + landing page deployed to https://e8f9eb9f.blackroad-network.pages.dev. Ready for waitlist signups!
